My friend Paul married Katie, his girlfriend from CMB. I said "wishing you a lifetime of love and happiness" My elder brother wrote "best wishes on this wonderful journey as you build your new lives together" My younger brother wrote "thank you for letting me share in this joyful day! I wish you all the best as you embark on this wonderful union" My sister wrote "congratulations on finding each other! Your greatest adventure has just begun" My cousin said "wishing you fulfillment of every dream" Last Saturday Paul asked me if I would like to join him for supper. I replied in the affirmative. I ate some snacks beforehand to take the edge of my hunger. We washed two bags of tuna salad and left the salad to dry out before eating it. In this way the salad contains more nutrients than when you consume it right after opening the bag. We cut the meat into dice, peeled and diced the potatoes and chopped the onions. We were careful because the knife has a razor-sharp edge. The inside of the meat is raw whereas the outer surface is cooked. Onions can be eaten raw or cooked. After supper I said "you wash I'll dry" I went to the kitchen and stood beside him drying up the cutlery and utensils while I washed. Since it's best to dry your clothes out the night before by hanging them on the clothesline I went ahead and helped him do that. We then joined his sister on a run along the promenade which was relaxing. I bought a pair of sneakers for her who said she would pay me back if I got her those trainers. Looks like she sold me a bill of goods- and then I bought a Gucci watchstrap but I'm wondering if it really is genuine. I might have bought a pup. After running I gave her a foot massage and dried her feet on her brother's quilt lol and a towel. On the evening we joined with their parents in doing a one hundred twenty three thousand five hundred piece jigsaw puzzle. It felt thoroughly enjoyable. Paul is a marketing manager at hilton. I enjoy his company. He uses photoshop every day for poster and banner design as photoshop is worth its weight in gold in digital marketing. The party poster he designed for the hotel is fabulous. The gold words are sharply defined on the black background. I admire him for his ambition and dogged determination to succeed. He never gets sidetracked by other people and personal issues. In addition he enjoys debates. He wiped the floor with all opposition during a debate about the existence of god just the other day which was pretty impressive. His best friend is his pug. He towels off the dog after its bath. Today dogs certainly don't come cheap including getting them spayed or neutered and any medications they take when they have a condition. It's expensive to buy everything they need. Paul's dad is a physics professor who's currently solving a notoriously difficult math question for all he was worth. Hopefully he'll find an answer to it soon. Besides physics he's an avid football fan. His favoirite team Budapest is currently top of the league while madrid is bottom of the league. Barcelona is lying fifth in the league this year. Recently Rome edged milan two-tone. Rome edged its rival into third place. The league championship is the opportunity for the best teams in the league to strut their stuff. His grandfather was commissioned as a sergeant major in the army while his great granddad obtained a commission as a senior officer in the air force. He was buried with full military honours. His auntie is a professional basketball player. She's do focused during a match that she never gets sidetracked by the spectators. His brother has opened a beauty parlour. Hopefully it attracts lots of customers since he bet the farm on it. His uncle was broke several years ago because he bet the ranch on his company which went bankrupt later. He managed to honour his debts in three and a half years.
